zh.lifeSummary: 當Christena Routson於1824年5月5日出生在美國俄亥俄州可倫比納亞時，她的父親Captain John William Routson28歲，母親Sarah Franks30歲。她於1841年5月13日與George Reighley在美國俄亥俄州韋恩結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1900年2月26日在美國威斯康辛州卡盧梅特爾頓享年75歲，埋葬在美國威斯康辛州卡盧梅特爾頓希爾希德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christena Routson于1824年5月5日出生在美国俄亥俄州可倫比納亞时，她的父亲Captain John William Routson28岁，母亲Sarah Franks30岁。她于1841年5月13日与George Reighley在美国俄亥俄州韋恩结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1900年2月26日在美国威斯康辛州卡盧梅特爾頓享年75岁，埋葬在美国威斯康辛州卡盧梅特爾頓希爾希德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Routson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: The progenitor of the Routsons (and Routzahns) was Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner from Germany, who in the middle of the 18th century settled in PA.

variants.name: Routzahn
meanings: Americanized form of German Rauenzahner: probably a nickname for someone with very irregular or ugly teeth, from Middle High German rouch, rūch ‘rough, hairy, unkempt’ + zant ‘tooth’ + -er agent suffix. The surname Rauenzahner has died out in Germany. Compare Routson .
History: The progenitor of the Routzahns (and Routsons) was Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner from Germany, who in the middle of the 18th century settled in PA.

nameMeanings.name: Christena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.

historicEvents.title: Kirtland Temple Dedicated
historicEvents.description: On March 27, 1836, the Kirtland Temple was dedicated.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

historicEvents.title: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War
historicEvents.description: Although divided as a state on the subject of slavery, Ohio participated in the Civil War on the Union's side, providing over 300,000 troops. Ohio provided the 3rd largest number of troops by any Union state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War

historicEvents.description: Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The First Successful Typewriter is Invented
historicEvents.description: A patent was filed on October 11, 1867, on a new direct action typewriter. The patent was filed by Christopher Latham Sholes, Carlos Glidden, and Samuel Soule who had invented the prototype in Milwaukee.

historicEvents.title: The Chinese Exclusion Act
historicEvents.description: A federal law prohibiting all immigration of Chinese laborers. The Act was the first law to prevent all members of a national group from immigrating to the United States.

historicEvents.title: The Newhall House Hotel Fire
historicEvents.description: A fire erupted on January 10, 1883, at the Newhall Hotel in Milwaukee. The fire began at 4:00 am in an elevator shaft and raced up through the building. The fire spread so quickly that many could not escape. General and Mrs. Tom Thumb, stars of P.T. Barnum's circus, were guests in the hotel at the time of the fire. A firefighter reached them by ladder and they were able to escape safely. The exact number of deaths remains unknown as the hotel register was destroyed in the fire, however, the death toll is estimated between 75-90.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Wisconsin Historical Society - Newhall House Hotel Fire

en.lifeSummary: When Christena Routson was born on 5 May 1824, in Columbiana, Ohio, United States, her father, Captain John William Routson, was 28 and her mother, Sarah Franks, was 30. She married George Reighley on 13 May 1841, in Wayne, Ohio, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 February 1900, in Chilton, Calumet, Wisconsin, United States, at the age of 75, and was buried in Hillside Cemetery, Chilton, Calumet, Wisconsin, United States.

Elle a épousé George Reighley le 13 mai 1841, à Wayne, Ohio, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 février 1900, à Chilton, Calumet, Wisconsin, États-Unis, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Hillside Cemetery, Chilton, Calumet, Wisconsin, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Christena Routsonが1824年5月5日にアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州コルンビアナで生まれた時，父Captain John William Routsonは28歳，母Sarah Franksは30歳であった。1841年5月13日にアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州ワインでGeorge Reighleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1900年2月26日にアメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州カルメットチルトンで75歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州カルメットチルトンヒルシド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Hillside Cemetery, Chilton, Calumet, Wis: 미국 위스콘신 주 캘럼트 치턴 힐시드 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Christena Routson(이)가 1824년 5월 5일 미국 오하이오 주 콜럼비아나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Captain John William Routson(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Franks(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1841년 5월 13일 미국 오하이오 주 웨이인에서 George Reighley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1900년 2월 26일 미국 위스콘신 주 캘럼트 치턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 위스콘신 주 캘럼트 치턴 힐시드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

ru.Hillside Cemetery, Chilton, Calumet, Wis: хиллсид кеметири, чилтон, калумет, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christena Routson родилась 5 мая 1824 г. в местности колумбяна, Огайо, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Captain John William Routson было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Franks, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Reighley 13 мая 1841 г. в местности веин, Огайо, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 февраля 1900 г. в местности чилтон, калумет, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности хиллсид кеметири, чилтон, калумет, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты.
